reasons: Ling's wall mobility lets Angela turn a fast map movement into a stronger dive or cleanup play.
Angela's shield and movement support help Ling survive after entering the backline.

proof.summary: Ling creates the high-mobility entry, while Angela strengthens the dive with shield and speed support.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches after Ling confirms the fight angle.
Ling uses the shield window to reach a priority target.
failureCases: Ling enters without enough resources or escape path.
Angela attaches while Ling is only rotating, wasting the timing.

reasons: Lancelot can dive quickly into the backline, making Angela's attach timing immediately valuable.
Angela's protection helps Lancelot survive after using mobility skills to commit.

proof.summary: Lancelot supplies the dive and burst, while Angela protects the commit window.
worksBestWhen: Lancelot has enough cooldowns to enter and exit.
Angela attaches as Lancelot starts the real engage.
failureCases: Lancelot uses mobility only to poke and Angela wastes ultimate.
Lancelot dives into layered crowd control.

reasons: Fanny's cable mobility lets Angela influence fights across large distances.
Angela's shield and support help Fanny survive while moving through dangerous fight areas.

proof.summary: Fanny creates fast dive access, while Angela adds survivability during the high-risk entry.
worksBestWhen: Fanny has enough resources to keep moving after Angela attaches.
Angela attaches during a real fight, not during empty rotation.
failureCases: Fanny runs out of resources mid-fight.
Enemy hard control catches Fanny after the attach.

reasons: Angela can shield Claude during aggressive Blazing Duet entries.
Claude's mobility lets him use Angela's attach window to enter, deal area damage, and reposition.

proof.summary: Angela improves Claude's survival during a mobile teamfight damage commit.
worksBestWhen: Claude enters after tracking enemy control cooldowns.
Angela attaches before Claude's main damage window.
failureCases: Claude dives into anti-mobility or suppression.
Angela attaches when Claude is not ready to commit.

reasons: Hayabusa can enter side or backline angles, and Angela can strengthen the pickoff attempt.
Angela's sustain helps Hayabusa survive if the target does not die instantly.

proof.summary: Hayabusa creates the assassination angle, while Angela gives him extra safety during the burst attempt.
worksBestWhen: Hayabusa isolates a target before Angela attaches.
Angela attaches during a committed pickoff, not during split-push rotation.
failureCases: Angela attaches while Hayabusa is about to disengage.
